raw_output_payload.reasoning:
We need command to find extensions length 3-6, unique count. Use find, basename, cut, awk. Command: find /workspace -type f -printf "%f\n" | sed -n 's/.*\.\([^.]\{3,6\}\)$/\1/p' | sort -u | wc -l

Return that.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content:
We need command to find extensions length 3-6, unique count. Use find, basename, cut, awk. Command: find /workspace -type f -printf "%f\n" | sed -n 's/.*\.\([^.]\{3,6\}\)$/\1/p' | sort -u | wc -l

Return that.

task.query: Count the number of unique 3 to 6 character file extensions are in the /workspace directory tree
task.gold: find /workspace -type f -name "*.*" | grep -o -E "\.[^\.]+$" | grep -o -E "[[:alpha:]]{3,6}" | awk '{print tolower($0)}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn

record.query: Count the number of unique 3 to 6 character file extensions are in the /workspace directory tree
record.gold: find /workspace -type f -name "*.*" | grep -o -E "\.[^\.]+$" | grep -o -E "[[:alpha:]]{3,6}" | awk '{print tolower($0)}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
